title: stelis sumacoensis
intro: Stelis sumacoensis, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and fever, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis sumacoensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis sumacoensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
